description: Universal-core set-membership predicates — PASSING surface (§55.1). oneOf(["Admin","Editor"]) on "Admin" and notIn(["banned"]) on "ok" both pass: each field isValid true, errors empty, compound rollup true.
rationale: §55.6 satisfied oneOf/notIn clear errors; §55.5 rollup true once all pass. Proves the valid direction of oneOf/notIn.
